use_cases: Ambient animated background for creative portfolios and landing pages
Visual effect component for entertainment and media applications
Decorative firefly animation for nature-themed or atmospheric designs
Standalone WebGL shader showcase for demonstrating technical abilities
Background animation for event or ambient display installations
ai_summary: Xordev Fireflies 1 is a WebGL shader-based animated firefly effect component using ray marching and GLSL ES 3.0 fragment shaders. It renders organic, glowing firefly particles with smooth mathematical animations driven by time uniforms, suitable as an ambient visual backdrop or standalone artistic element for creative and media applications.
